channel.title: Samples on My Hugo
channel.description: Recent content in Samples on My Hugo

item.title: Embedded Objects
item.description: .svg-container { display: flex; flex-flow: row wrap; background: #ffd5d5; } .isvg { background: #fff0fe; } #c1 { fill: yellow; } .setc { fill: cyan; } #rect8424 { stroke: pink; } SVG Linked SVG -- HTML Script
